title: cyclosorus falcatulus
intro: Cyclosorus falcatulus, also known as the Japanese sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus falcatulus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
